metadata.title: Synedria — Intentional Study Groups
metadata.description: Find and create small study groups based on shared interests and goals, with a preference for in-person meetings.

landing.heroSub: Synedria helps you form small study groups based on shared interests and goals, with a preference for in-person meetings.
landing.step1Desc: Add your skills, city, and availability.
landing.step2Desc: Search groups by topic, city, and format. Or create your own.
landing.step3Desc: Meet up, track progress, grow together.

dashboard.noActiveGroups: You're not in any group yet.

myGroups.noActive: You're not in any active group.

login.subtitle: Sign in to create your profile, join groups, and start learning together.

privacy.intro: Synedria ("the Platform") processes users' personal data in compliance with the European Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR). This notice describes what data we collect, why we collect it, and what your rights are.
privacy.controller: The data controller is the operator of the Synedria platform, reachable at synedria.app@proton.me.
privacy.dataIntro: We collect the following personal data, exclusively for the operation of the platform:
privacy.dataAuth: Authentication data (name, email, avatar) — provided automatically by the OAuth provider (GitHub, Google) at login. Purpose: user identification and platform access.
privacy.dataProfile: Profile data (city, availability, preferred format, preferred language) — provided voluntarily by the user. Purpose: matching with compatible study groups.
privacy.dataSkills: Skills (name, level, intention, goal) — provided voluntarily by the user. Purpose: search and discovery of relevant groups.
privacy.dataGroups: Participation data (group membership, check-ins, attendance) — generated through platform use. Purpose: study group functionality.
privacy.legalBasis: Data processing is based on user consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), expressed at registration through the OAuth provider, and on the performance of the requested service (Art. 6.1.b GDPR).
privacy.thirdParties: Personal data is not sold, transferred, or shared with third parties for commercial purposes. Data is stored on Supabase servers (cloud infrastructure with data centers in the European Union). Authentication is managed through OAuth providers (GitHub, Google), each subject to their own privacy policy.
privacy.retention: Personal data is retained for the duration of the account. Upon account deletion, all personal data is immediately removed. Anonymous participation data (check-in attendance) is preserved in anonymized form to maintain group history.
privacy.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy.rightAccess: Access your personal data (visible on the profile page)
privacy.rightRectify: Rectify inaccurate data (editable from the profile page)
privacy.rightDelete: Delete your account and all associated data (from the "Data deletion" section in your profile)
privacy.rightPortability: Request data portability in a readable format
privacy.rightObject: Object to the processing of your data
privacy.rightsOutro: To exercise your portability or objection rights, contact us at the address above.
privacy.changes: We reserve the right to update this policy. Substantial changes will be communicated through the platform. The date of the last update is indicated above.

cookies.intro: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device to remember information about your visit.
cookies.technical: Synedria uses only strictly necessary technical cookies for the operation of the platform. These cookies do not require user consent under Art. 122 of the Italian Privacy Code and the guidelines of the Italian Data Protection Authority.
cookies.cookieSession: Supabase session cookie — manages authentication and keeps the user session active. Duration: until session expiry or logout. Type: technical, first-party.
cookies.cookieLocale: Language preference cookie — stores the user's chosen language (Italian or English). Duration: 1 year. Type: technical, first-party.
cookies.noTracking: Synedria currently does not use profiling, advertising, or analytics cookies. We do not integrate third-party services that install tracking cookies. Should any services requiring additional cookies be introduced in the future, this page will be updated and, where required by law, user consent will be requested.
cookies.control: You can delete or block cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling technical cookies may prevent the platform from functioning properly (for example, you won't be able to stay logged in).

contact.content: For support, reports, or information, you can write to us at:

profile.goalPlaceholder: e.g. get AWS certification by June
profile.visibilityComplete: Your profile is complete. You are visible in search results.
profile.visibilityIncomplete: You won't appear in search results until you complete:
profile.deleteWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data, groups, and skills will be permanently deleted.
profile.deleteErrorReferent: You cannot delete your account while you are the referent of an active group. Close the group or transfer the role first.
profile.deleteErrorGeneric: Error deleting your account. Please try again.

groups.createError: Error creating the group. Please try again.
groups.objectivePlaceholder: e.g. prepare for AWS Solutions Architect certification
groups.studyModePlaceholder: e.g. practical projects, Q&A taking turns

search.noResults: No groups found with these filters.
search.fewResults: Few results? You could create one!

groupPage.loginToJoin: Sign in to join this group.
groupPage.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this group?
groupPage.leaveAndCloseConfirm: You are the last member. Leaving will close the group.
groupPage.leaveBlockedReferent: You are the referent of this group. To leave, close the group first.
groupPage.closeGroupConfirm: Close the group? It will no longer accept new members.
groupPage.noReferent: This group has no referent to manage join requests.
groupPage.groupClosed: This group is not accepting new members.

checkIn.duplicateError: A check-in already exists for this date.

joinRequest.introPlaceholder: Briefly introduce yourself to the group referent...
joinRequest.objectivePlaceholder: Why do you want to join this group? What's your goal?
